name: aoquality

metadata.name: aoquality
classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: GNU General Public License v3 or later (GPLv3+)
metadata.summary: Python module to access Measurement Sets' quality statistics produced by aoflagger, aoquality or DPPP.

documentation:
# pyaoquality

Python module to access Measurement Sets' quality statistics produced by aoflagger, aoquality or DPPP.

## Installation

pyaoquality can be installed via pip:

    $ pip install aoquality

and requires Python 3.6.0 or higher.

# Usage

Example to retrieve baseline statistics:


```python
aoq = aoquality.AOQualityBaselineStat(ms_file)

# plot SNR as function of baseline length:
plt.plot(aoq.blenght, aoq.SNR)

# plot SNR as function of first antenna:
plt.plot(aoq.ant1, aoq.SNR)

```

To retrieve time statistics:


```python
aot = aoquality.AOQualityTimeStat(ms_file)

# plot RFI percentage as function of time:
plt.plot(aot.time, aot.RFIPercentage)

```

To retrieve frequency statistics:


```python
aof = aoquality.AOQualityFrequencyStat(ms_file)

# plot Std as function of frequencies:
plt.plot(aof.freqs, aof.Std)

```

# Command line tool

There is also a command line tool, aostats, which usage is as follow:

    Usage: aostats plot [OPTIONS] MS_FILES... [Mean|Std|DStd|Count|DCount|Sum|DSum
                        |DSumP2|Variance|DVariance|SNR|RFICount|RFIPercentage]

      Plot Statistics from AO Quality Tables

      MS_FILES: Input MS files STAT_NAME: Statistic Name

    Options:
      -o, --out_prefix TEXT    Prefix to the output filename  [default: stat]
      -p, --pol INTEGER RANGE  Polarization index: 0->XX, 1->XY, 2->YX, 3->YY
                               [default: 0]

      --log                    Plot in log scale
      --vmin FLOAT             Minimum value
      --vmax FLOAT             Maximum value
      --name TEXT              Title of the plot
      --help                   Show this message and exit.

modules.name: aoquality.tools.aostats
documentation: !/usr/bin/env python3

functions.name: aoquality.tools.aostats.plot
documentation:
Plot Statistics from AO Quality Tables 

MS_FILES: Input MS files
STAT_NAME: Statistic Name

modules.name: aoquality.aoquality
documentation: Python module to access statistics from QUALITY table

functions.name: aoquality.aoquality.make_ant_matrix
documentation:
Make antenna x antenna matrix from flat array

Args:
    ant1 (array): Antenna 1
    ant2 (array): Antenna 2
    m (array): Flat array
    a_max (int, optional): Max antenna number

Returns:
    array (n_ant, n_ant): antenna x antenna matrix

methods.name: aoquality.aoquality.BaseAOQuality.Std
documentation: Standard deviation of the visibilities

methods.name: aoquality.aoquality.BaseAOQuality.Variance
documentation: Variance of the visibilities

methods.name: aoquality.aoquality.BaseAOQuality.DStd
documentation: Standard deviation of the channels difference visibilities

methods.name: aoquality.aoquality.BaseAOQuality.DVariance
documentation: Variance of the channels difference visibilities

methods.name: aoquality.aoquality.BaseAOQuality.Mean
documentation: Mean of the visibilities

methods.name: aoquality.aoquality.BaseAOQuality.SNR
documentation: Mean of the visibilities over rms of the channel difference's visibilities

methods.name: aoquality.aoquality.BaseAOQuality.RFIPercentage
documentation: Percentage of RFI flagged data

methods.name: aoquality.aoquality.BaseAOQuality.get_stat
documentation:
Return the given statistic.

Args:
    name (str): The statistic to retrieve. See aoquality.available_stats for a list of available statistics

classes.name: aoquality.aoquality.AOQualityBaselineStat

methods.name: aoquality.aoquality.AOQualityBaselineStat.__init__
documentation:
AO quality baseline statistics

Args:
    ms_file (str): MS path

methods.name: aoquality.aoquality.AOQualityBaselineStat.get_combined_stat
documentation:
Return combined statistics applying action_fct over the frequency axis.
   Useful when gathering statistics from combined QUALITY tables, but safe to use for non combined 
   QUALITY tables as well: it will be a no-op in this case.

Args:
    stat_name (str): The statistic to retrieve. See aoquality.available_stats for a list of available statistics
    action_fct (fct, optional): The function to apply over the frequency axis

Returns:
    ant1 (n_baselines), ant2 (n_baselines), blenght (n_baselines), stat (n_baselines, n_pol)

methods.name: aoquality.aoquality.AOQualityBaselineStat.plot_baseline_stats
documentation:
Plot 2D matrix of baselines statistics

Args:
    stat_name (str): The statistic to retrieve. See aoquality.available_stats for a list of available statistics
    pol (int, optional): The polarization to plot: 0:XX, 1:XY, 2:YX, 2:YY

Returns:
    Figure: the matplotlib figure

methods.name: aoquality.aoquality.AOQualityBaselineStat.plot_antennae_stats
documentation:
Plot the statistic for each individual antennae/station

Args:
    stat_name (str): The statistic to retrieve. See aoquality.available_stats for a list of available statistics
    pol (int, optional): The polarization to plot: 0:XX, 1:XY, 2:YX, 2:YY

Returns:
    Figure: the matplotlib figure

methods.name: aoquality.aoquality.AOQualityBaselineStat.plot_baseline_length_stats
documentation:
Plot the statistic for each baselines as function of baseline length

Args:
    stat_name (str): The statistic to retrieve. See aoquality.available_stats for a list of available statistics
    pol (int, optional): The polarization to plot: 0:XX, 1:XY, 2:YX, 2:YY

Returns:
    Figure: the matplotlib figure

AO quality baseline statistics

Attributes:
    ant1 (array of int): Antenna 1
    ant2 (array of int): Antenna 2
    ant_name (array of str): Name of the stations
    ant_pos (array): Positions of the stations
    blenght (array): Baseline length in meter

methods.name: aoquality.aoquality.AOQualityFrequencyStat.get_combined_stat
documentation:
Return combined statistics applying action_fct over the frequency axis.

   QUALITY tables as well: it will be a no-op in this case.

Returns:
